afflictions.remedy: Donate wheat and jaggery on Sundays. Avoid accepting gifts from father.
Throw copper coin in flowing river. Feed Brahmin on Sunday.
Keep saffron tilak on forehead. Donate red clothes.

general_remedies: Offer water to Sun every morning
Wear ruby (only if Sun is benefic in chart)
Read or listen to Aditya Hriday Stotra

afflictions.remedy: Keep a square piece of silver in pocket. Donate white items on Monday.
Keep a piece of silver given by mother. Chant Mahamrityunjaya mantra.

general_remedies: Keep a vessel full of water near bed head at night
Wear pearl or moonstone
Donate rice and milk on Mondays

afflictions.remedy: Marry a tree (Peepal/Ashvattha) first. Feed sweets to brothers. Keep red handkerchief.
Keep square piece of silver. Feed dogs regularly. Throw sweet roti in fire.
Plant pomegranate tree. Donate red lentils on Tuesday.

general_remedies: Worship Lord Hanuman on Tuesdays
Wear red coral (only if Mars is benefic)
Donate red clothes and masoor dal

afflictions.remedy: Wear emerald in little finger. Feed green vegetables to cows.
Keep a solid silver ball in pocket. Donate green items on Wednesday.

general_remedies: Feed green fodder to cows on Wednesdays
Wear green clothes on Wednesdays
Keep a green plant (tulsi) at home

afflictions.remedy: Wear yellow sapphire. Feed Brahmins on Thursday.
Apply turmeric tilak on forehead. Donate yellow clothes.

general_remedies: Worship Lord Vishnu/Peepal tree on Thursdays
Wear yellow clothes on Thursdays
Donate yellow items and bananas

afflictions.remedy: Wear diamond or white sapphire. Feed white sweets to young girls.
Donate cow (or equivalent). Keep a white cow at home if possible.
Keep a silver piece in wallet. Donate white clothes on Friday.

general_remedies: Worship Goddess Lakshmi on Fridays
Wear white clothes on Fridays
Donate white items - rice, sugar, milk

afflictions.remedy: Donate iron and black items on Saturday. Feed black dogs.
Keep a square piece of iron. Light mustard oil lamp under peepal on Saturdays.

general_remedies: Feed black sesame to ants on Saturdays
Donate black blanket and mustard oil
Light lamp under peepal tree on Saturdays

afflictions.remedy: Wear hessonite (gomed). Feed Brahmin on Saturday.
Keep a solid silver elephant at home. Donate blue items.

general_remedies: Worship Goddess Durga
Wear dark blue clothes on Saturdays
Donate black and blue items

afflictions.remedy: Wear cat's eye (lehsunia). Worship Lord Ganesha.
Keep a brown dog at home. Feed dogs regularly.

general_remedies: Worship Lord Ganesha on Tuesdays
Donate multicolored blankets
Keep a pet dog if possible

relationship_specific.remedy: Perform marriage ceremony with a peepal or banana tree before actual marriage
Fast on Saturdays, feed poor, donate iron items
Both partners should donate red items on Tuesdays. Keep rose quartz in bedroom.
Donate yellow items on Thursdays. Respect elders and touch their feet daily.
